seo.title: Backline & Stage Rental — BEATROX
seo.description: Beatrox provides professional backline and stage rental services for concerts, tours, and events — drum kits, guitar/bass amplifiers, keyboards, and full stage packages with setup support.

og.title: Backline & Stage Rental — BEATROX Portland
og.description: Professional-grade backline and stage packages for concerts and tours — drum kits, amplifiers, keyboards, and staging from the Beatrox team.

hero.headline: Backline & Stage Rental
hero.subheadline: Professional-grade backline and stage packages — so your artists hit the stage ready to perform, every time.

body.content: Beatrox's backline and stage rental service is built for touring acts, festivals, and one-off concert productions. Our team — led by Joey Paulekas, who has toured with Odesza and global brands — understands exactly what artists and production managers need from a backline package.

body.heading: Why Choose Beatrox
items: 15+ years of experience in live event production
Full-service team from design to strike
Portland-based with nationwide coverage
Trusted by Adidas, Netflix, CNN, Amazon Music

body.heading: Our Process
items: 1. Discovery Call — We learn your vision, venue, and budget
2. Design & Pre-Visualization — See your event before it happens
3. Equipment & Crew — We source everything and assign the right team
4. On-Site Execution — Professional setup, operation, and strike
5. Post-Event Review — We ensure everything exceeded expectations

body.heading: Ideal For
items: Touring artists and concert productions
Festivals and multi-artist lineups
Corporate events with live bands
Recording sessions and rehearsals
One-off special performances

body.heading: Complete Stage Packages
body.content: From drum kits and amplifiers to staging risers and monitor systems, Beatrox configures stage packages to artist riders and venue specs. We handle delivery, setup, and technical support, and can integrate backline packages with our full AV and lighting production services for a seamless, single-vendor experience.

body.heading: Rider Matching Process
body.content: We know that a backline package is only as good as its match to the artist's rider. Our process begins with a detailed review of your artist's technical requirements — drum brands, amp models, keyboard configurations, and monitor preferences. We cross-reference our inventory, source anything missing, and confirm every detail before load-in. Our goal is zero surprises on stage.

body.heading: Touring Packages & Artist-Specific Configurations
body.content: For touring acts, we build repeatable, road-ready packages that maintain consistency across every date. This includes matched drum kits, dialed-in amp settings, road-case packaging, and spares for critical gear. We can also configure artist-specific setups — from signature amp combinations to custom keyboard rigs — ensuring every show feels familiar and professional.

body.heading: Common Backline
items: Pearl, DW, and Ludwig drum kit configurations
Marshall, Fender, Mesa/Boogie guitar amplifiers
Ampeg, Darkglass bass amplification
Nord, Roland, and Korg keyboard/synthesizer systems
Stage risers and custom platform builds
Audio-Technica and Shure microphone packages

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance for standard rentals and 8–12 weeks for custom productions. Last-minute requests are often accommodated depending on availability.

items.question: Do you travel outside Portland?
items.answer: Absolutely. While we're headquartered in Portland, OR, we regularly serve clients across the West Coast and nationwide for touring and large-scale events.

items.question: What's included in the rental?
items.answer: Every rental includes delivery, setup, on-site technical support, and strike. Custom packages can also include content design, pre-visualization, and dedicated project management.

items.question: Can you match an artist's rider exactly?
items.answer: Yes. Our team reviews every detail of your artist's rider and sources matching equipment. If something is unavailable, we propose approved alternatives and confirm with the artist's team before the event.

items.question: Do you offer touring packages?
items.answer: Absolutely. We build road-ready, repeatable touring packages with matched gear, road cases, and spares — ensuring consistency and reliability across every tour date.
